---
title: "Announcements - June 20"
date: "2025-6-20"
format: 
  revealjs:
    output-file: 24-announcments-slides.html
    pdf-separate-fragments: true
auto-stretch: false
---

## Announcements {.xsmall}

::: incremental
-   Do your second peer feedback survey! **Now: today at noon!!**

-   Project: **Due MONDAY MORNING!**

    -   Presentations are in class first thing.

        -   Time limit:

            -   5 minutes

            -   6 minutes: -1 point

            -   7 minutes: -2 points

            -   8 minutes: Cut off!!

        -   You do not have to record your presentations
        
    -   Reports: read the requirements carefully!! (pay attention: 10 pages)
    
-   Final review on Monday: fill out the survey!

-   Final: Thursday 2 - 5 pm

-   Please please please fill out my teaching review:)


:::
